content: Who is coming to the Whiskey Flight Friday at The Nest? Lineup looks incredible this week
I will be there! Already have my spot reserved. The single barrel flight is calling my name.
Cannot make Friday but the Rooftop Jazz event looks amazing. Anyone going on the 15th?
Just signed up for Miranda Masterclass! Been wanting to level up my Negroni game for months.
Pro tip: come to Whiskey Flight on an empty stomach. The food pairings this week are exceptional.
The Gin Festival on the 22nd is the main event this month. 30+ distilleries — it is going to be legendary.
